sections.subtitle: Recent Form Analysis
sections.text: Udinese have had mixed results in their last 5 matches, with 1 win, 2 losses, and 2 draws, showing inconsistent form. Fiorentina, on the other hand, have secured 2 wins and 3 losses in their last 5 matches, indicating a slightly better but still shaky performance. Both teams have struggled defensively, with Udinese conceding in 3 of their last 5 and Fiorentina in all 8 of their recent games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Analysis
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, Udinese managed a 2-1 win in December 2024, while the earlier match in January 2024 ended in a 2-2 draw. Both matches saw goals from both sides, suggesting a trend of open, competitive games between these teams.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics Insights
sections.text: Fiorentina hold a higher league position (8th, 62 points) compared to Udinese (12th, 44 points), with a stronger offensive output (57 goals vs 39). However, both teams have defensive vulnerabilities, with Fiorentina conceding in most recent games and Udinese having a poor clean sheet record at home.

sections.subtitle: Key Player Impact
sections.text: Fiorentina's Moise Kean (18 goals) poses a significant threat, while Udinese will rely on Lorenzo Lucca (11 goals) for attacking impetus. Missing key players like Florian Thauvin for Udinese and Albert Guðmundsson for Fiorentina could balance the impact on both sides.
